task_objective: Sync vendored pyludusavi to clean upstream 0.2.2 and keep SDH-specific subprocess environment handling in first-party code.
design_decisions: Vendored pyludusavi was replaced with clean 0.2.2 files from the resolved uv environment.
PyludusaviAdapter now calls Ludusavi(flatpak_id=FLATPAK_ID) without patched upstream arguments.
LD_LIBRARY_PATH is cleared through an SDH-owned executor proxy instead of editing pyludusavi.
Tests that asserted SDH patches inside pyludusavi were removed.
results: Focused red-green tests passed. Full validation results are recorded in the final task response.
